description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a sleek black and gold color scheme. The cabinet features a glossy black top with horizontal ridges and a front panel that appears to be a single, wide drawer with two subtle horizontal handles. The frame is constructed from metallic gold supports with black accents, giving it a luxurious and contemporary appearance. The legs are thin and angular, connected by horizontal bars for added stability. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible ornamentation aside from the color contrast and geometric lines. The cabinet is likely intended for use as a console or accent piece in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or upscale public spaces.
description: A modern black and gold cabinet with a glossy ridged top, single wide drawer, and thin metallic frame. Its minimalistic design features subtle handles and angular supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide drawer with two horizontal handles and the full width of the glossy ridged top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin depth of the cabinet and the gold-accented frame structure.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back panel, which is plain and lacks handles or drawer features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the slim profile and frame details.
